titles.title: Down to the river to pray

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: As I went down in the river to pray Studying about that good old way And who shall wear the starry crown Good Lord, show me the way!

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: O sisters, let's go down, Let's go down, come on down O sisters, let's go down Down in the river to pray

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: As I went down in the river to pray Studying about that good old way And who shall wear the robe and crown Good Lord, show me the way!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: O brothers, let's go down Let's go down, come on down Come on, brothers, let's go down Down in the river to pray

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: As I went down in the river to pray Studying about that good old way And who shall wear the starry crown Good Lord, show me the way!

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: O fathers, let's go down Let's go down, come on down O fathers, let's go down Down in the river to pray

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: As I went down in the river to pray Studying about that good old way And who shall wear the robe and crown Good Lord, show me the way!

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: O mothers, let's go down Let's go down; don't you want to go down? Come on, mothers, let's go down Down in the river to pray

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: As I went down in the river to pray Studying about that good old way And who shall wear the starry crown Good Lord, show me the way!

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: O sinners, let's go down Let's go down, come on down O sinners, let's go down Down in the river to pray

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: As I went down in the river to pray Studying about that good old way And who shall wear the robe and crown Good Lord, show me the way!
